order: SHARED.md sec 7 -- contract parses 32-byte big-endian Fr in this exact order
witness: BUY 10 base @ price 2.0 (20000000); note holds 100 quote; locks 20 quote; change 80 quote

public_inputs.name: merkle_root
public_inputs.description: Root the balance note belongs to.

public_inputs.name: nullifier
public_inputs.description: Nullifier of the consumed balance note (locks funds).

public_inputs.name: order_commitment
public_inputs.description: hash7 of the hidden order; contract stores it in the active set.

public_inputs.name: change_commitment
public_inputs.description: Balance note for remaining funds (0 if none).

public_inputs.name: locked_asset_id
public_inputs.description: Asset locked for this order (buy -> quote asset; here id 1).
